issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' (checks Leader type), not 'HasCardOnBoard' (checks board state). Text says 'your Leader has the {Animal Kingdom Pirates} type'
Condition structure incorrect. Should use 'type':'LeaderHasType' with 'value':'Animal Kingdom Pirates', not 'name' field
GiveDon action is incomplete. Must include 'rested':true since text explicitly states 'rest it'. Current action missing rest behavior
